fields.name: Contract Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of contract that was filed.

fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service contract or service contract quote that was filed.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the filed contract line.

fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service item on the filed service contract line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the service item group associated with the filed service item line.

fields.name: Serial No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the service item on the filed service item line.

fields.name: Service Item Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the service item group associated with this service item.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item number linked to the service item in the filed contract.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated time interval after work on the service order starts.

fields.name: Last Planned Service Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the last planned service on this item.

fields.name: Next Planned Service Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the next planned service on this item.

fields.name: Last Service Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the last actual service on this item.

fields.name: Last Preventive Maint. Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the last time preventative service was performed on this item.

fields.name: Invoiced to Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the contract was last invoiced.

fields.name: Credit Memo Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when you can create a credit memo for the item that needs to be removed from the service contract.

fields.name: Contract Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the service item should be removed from the service contract.

fields.name: Service Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated time that elapses until service starts on the service item.

fields.name: Line Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value on the service item line in the service contract.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage that is granted for the item on the line.

fields.name: Line Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net amount, excluding any invoice discount amount, that must be paid for products on the line.

fields.name: New Line
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this service contract line is a new line.

fields.name: Line Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calculated cost of the item line in the filed service contract or filed service contract quote.

fields.name: Line Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the discount on the contract line in the filed service contract or filed contract quote.

fields.name: Profit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the profit on the contract line in the filed service contract or filed contract quote.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique number of filed service contract or service contract quote.
